title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The curtain has fallen on my first three years with
Hishi Akebono.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the next act is only just getting started. One
day, while contemplating where to go from here...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, would you mind helping me again
with my next Umastalive?
choice_data_list: Sure, but why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The last time you joined my stream, it made
everyone interested in my races!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So many people came to watch me run, and they
cheered their hearts out for me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Now that things have calmed down, I want to give
them all a proper thank-you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she asked, I end up joining Hishi Akebono
on another live stream.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Every day is buono! Big and delicious is the
best. ♪ I'm Hishi Akebono! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Today, your favorite guest, a.k.a. my trainer, is
going to help out again!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
Hi there, Trainer!
Great job on your race, Bono!
I watched you at the venue!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Comments start flying in, and they seem a bit
friendlier than the ones we received last time.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Let's jump right into today's stream! We're
gonna make quick and easy baumkuchen! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you how you can make it at home in a
frying pan!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
First, melt the butter in the microwave. While it's
heating up, mix the eggs, sugar, and honey
together.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Once the wet ingredients are ready, add in the
flour. Trainer, could you get the cake flour and
baking powder for me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono's Umastalive moves along
swimmingly.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Pour the batter into the pan. Now, place the
aluminum foil log we made on top of it. Next,
wrap the cake sponge round and round the foil!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A pleasantly sweet aroma fills the kitchen as she
rolls up the thin sheets of sponge into a cylinder.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And there we go! Our delightfully buono
baumkuchen is ready!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Now that it's done, let's have some, Trainer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The piece she gives me is cool enough to eat but
still toasty warm.
choice_data_list: Thanks! I can't wait to taste this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A single bite of the cake's fluffy sweetness is
enough to make me smile from ear to ear.

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Trainer sure is enjoying that cake.
You have a great trainer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. Yep! I wouldn't want to have anyone else
as my trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! I asked Trainer to come today because
I wanted to thank everybody!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
Thank us?
What for?
I don't remember doing anything...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember when I introduced Trainer to
you all during my Umastalive?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You were all so supportive of me, even though
that segment wasn't about cooking!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And so many of you came to watch me race in
person! That made me really, really happy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
My race schedule has slowed down now, but I was
able to make a lot of great memories during the
busy season.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I was only able to do that because all of you kept
encouraging me with such happy smiles.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to thank you all. From the
bottom of my heart...

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text: Oh, Bono! You're a good egg, kiddo. No, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna keep doing things to the best of our
abilities, whether it's cooking or racing.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I hope you'll all continue rooting for Trainer and
me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Please keep cheering us on tomorrow, the day
after that, and on and on to eternity!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
Of course!
You've gotta do your best forever and ever too!
Ooh! Is that why you made baumkuchen?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oops, I guess my cover's blown.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I decided to make baumkuchen today because it's
considered a good luck charm, and there was
something I wanted to wish for.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
While making it, I wished that the two of us can
continue being happy and growing big together.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It's kinda embarrassing to have my cover
blown, though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stream ends with a tsunami of comments and
stamps from the viewers.
